series_metadata.series_description: This retention schedule consists of, but is not limited to, signed certificates of disposal completed by the Division, any certificates of destruction and any correspondence associated with these records.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper records shall be maintained two years from date of destruction of records. ; Electronic: any records maintained in machine readable format, records shall be maintained two years from date of destruction of records. ; Microform: any records maintained in microform, records shall be maintained two years from date of destruction of records
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase ; Microform: Recycle
